content:
# Chemical Flooding

**Summary**: The use of chemical agents to enhance the permeability of a reservoir rock.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017]] investigated chemical-flooding using novel waste oil emulsified acids for limestone stimulation.

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] applied chemical-flooding models to test the scalability of EDMM and ETMM for complex EOR scenarios.

- [[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023]] used chemical-flooding to reduce MMP and FCMP in CO2-oil systems.

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] investigated chemical flooding applications by utilizing thermochemical fluids (TCFs) for fracture cleanup and well cleanout.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017]] ['wormhole growth', 'diffusion coefficients', 'acid stability']

- [[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022]] applied chemical-flooding models to test the scalability of EDMM and ETMM for complex EOR scenarios.

- [[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023]] used chemical-flooding to reduce MMP and FCMP in CO2-oil systems.

- [[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024]] investigated chemical flooding applications by utilizing thermochemical fluids (TCFs) for fracture cleanup and well cleanout.

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017]] ['core-flooding', 'rotating-disk-experiment']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The waste oil acid showed superior performance over plain HCl at higher injection rates. ([[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017, p. 80]])

- EDMM and ETMM were shown to be capable of handling concentration equations in addition to saturation equations. ([[2022-adeyemi|Adeyemi, 2022, p. 104]])

- Ionic liquids (Sx1, Sx4) were found to be more effective than commercial chemicals at lower concentrations for reducing MMP and FCMP. ([[2023-al-hakami|Al-Hakami, 2023, p. 138]])

- TCFs like NaNO2 and NH4Cl are common in the industry due to low cost and high heat generation, but require careful management of their reactivity. ([[2024-abdallah|Abdallah, 2024, p. 73]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2017-ahmed-2|AHMED, 2017]] Managing acid stability at HPHT and ensuring deep wormhole penetration.
